optimizations_applied: Morsel-driven parallelism across 64 cores (200K rows per morsel)
Efficient mmap-based columnar I/O with sequential access hints
Branch-free filtering combining all predicates (date range, discount range, quantity threshold)
notes: Q6 is a single-aggregate query with compound predicates (1.9% selectivity). Achieved 1.2M matching rows out of 60M with correct result 1230113636.01. Parallelism provides good scaling across cores.
